signals.headline: Russia announces temporary ceasefire with Ukraine** | YES | HIGH confidence
signals.raw:
Russia announces temporary ceasefire with Ukraine** | YES | HIGH confidence

Russia announced a temporary ceasefire with Ukraine running from April 11 at 4:00 PM to April 12 at the end of the day[3]. Russian officials stated the purpose is to reduce hostilities during a religious holiday[3].

signals.headline: Russia and China veto UN resolution on Iran and Strait of Hormuz** | YES | HIGH confidence
signals.raw:
Russia and China veto UN resolution on Iran and Strait of Hormuz** | YES | HIGH confidence

Russia, China, and France blocked a UN Security Council resolution that would have authorized military action to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, with the US warning that Iran's potential blockade could be Tehran's "last act"[1][2].
